mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, release_id, created_by, assignee_id, created_at, updated_at FROM defects ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defects (title, description, status, release_id, created_by, assignee_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{releaseId}, #{createdBy}, #{assigneeId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE defects SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, release_id = #{releaseId}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM defects WHERE status = '已解决' AND DATE(updated_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
